data.title: Personalization
data.technical_spec: Algorithm-driven recommendations based on user listening habits.

data.title: Cross-Platform Accessibility
data.description: Support across multiple devices and platforms.
data.technical_spec: Apps available for iOS, Android, desktop, and web with synchronized experiences.

data.title: Community Engagement
data.description: Building a community through playlist sharing and social features.
data.technical_spec: Integration of social media features, allowing playlist sharing and collaborative playlists.

data.title: Innovative UX/UI
data.description: Commitment to a user-friendly, innovative interface.
data.technical_spec: Emphasizes intuitive design with constant updates based on user feedback.

data.title: Music Discovery
data.description: Facilitates discovery of new music and artists.
data.technical_spec: Curated playlists and algorithm-based discovery features like 'Discover Weekly.'
